title: Saudi Arabian Beef Dumplings
description: A flavorful and spicy dish from Saudi Arabia, made with tender beef and served with crispy fried dumplings.
instructions: In a large pan, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
Add the onion, ginger, and garlic. Cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the beef broth and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let cook for 10 minutes.
While the beef is cooking, mix the flour and egg in a bowl.
Add the beaten egg and flour mixture to the beef and stir until combined.
Cover and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
While the beef is cooking, prepare the dumpling dough by mixing the flour and egg in a bowl.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth.
Divide the dough into small pieces and roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of the beef mixture in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal.
Heat 2-3 inches of oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Fry the dumplings until they are golden brown, about 2-3 minutes on each side.
Drain the dumplings on paper towels and serve hot with a sprinkle of chopped almonds.
